rows.label: tlk45300012_04_msg0001
rows.name:
They say Divine Beasts are
rampaging and causing confusion
all over.

rows.label: tlk45300012_04_msg0002
rows.name:
My business partners are
taking time off to check
whether their families are safe.

rows.label: tlk45300012_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Maybe I should visit home
and show my mother I'm well
for once.
